prose: The frontier orbitals calculation on pyridine was performed using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The HOMO energy is -7.2525992 eV, the LUMO energy is -1.112786 eV, and the HOMO-LUMO gap is 6.1398131 eV. The SCF converged successfully in 10 cycles.
